name: Supplier Monitoring
purpose: The purpose is to track and assess the performance of an external contract-based supplier company against agreed commitments.

outcomes.text: Joint activities, as agreed between the customer and the supplier, are performed.
All information, agreed upon for exchange, is communicated regularly between the customer and the supplier.
Performance of the supplier is monitored against the agreements.
Changes to the agreement, if needed, are negotiated between the customer and the supplier and documented in the agreement.

basePractices.title: Agree on and maintain joint activities, joint interfaces, and information to be
basePractices.description: exchanged. Establish and maintain an agreement on information to be exchanged, on joint activities, joint interfaces, responsibilities, type and frequency of joint activities, communications, meetings, status reports, and reviews.

basePractices.title: Exchange all agreed information
basePractices.description: Use the defined joint interfaces between customer and supplier for the exchange of all agreed information.

basePractices.title: Review development work products with the supplier
basePractices.description: Review development work products with the supplier on the agreed regular basis, covering technical aspects, problems and risks. Track open measures.

basePractices.title: Review progress of the supplier
basePractices.description: Review progress of the supplier regarding schedule, quality, and cost on the agreed regular basis. Track open measures to closure and perform risk mitigation activities.

basePractices.title: Act to correct deviations
basePractices.description: Take action when agreed objectives are not achieved.
